# PeekAndPoke Ultra

> A suite of open-source Kotlin libraries for building modern applications.
> Published on Maven Central as `io.peekandpoke.ultra`. Version: 0.102.0. Kotlin: 2.3.10.

- Website: https://peekandpoke.io
- Source: https://github.com/PeekAndPoke/ultra
- Maven Central: https://central.sonatype.com/namespace/io.peekandpoke.ultra

## Docs

- [Kraft](https://peekandpoke.io/llms/kraft.md): Build SPAs in pure Kotlin — components, reactive state, routing, forms, SemanticUI DSL, 12 addons
- [Kontainer](https://peekandpoke.io/llms/kontainer.md): Lightweight DI container — per-request scoping, singleton/dynamic/prototype services, modules
- [Slumber](https://peekandpoke.io/llms/slumber.md): Kotlin-first serialization — nullable-aware, sealed class polymorphism, two-pass error handling
- [Streams](https://peekandpoke.io/llms/streams.md): Reactive streams — always-has-a-value, composable operators, lazy subscriptions
- [Karango](https://peekandpoke.io/llms/karango.md): Type-safe ArangoDB — Kotlin query DSL, KSP codegen, repository pattern, CRUD, indexes, hooks

## Optional: Complete docs in one file

- [llms-full.txt](https://peekandpoke.io/llms-full.txt): All documentation in a single file (153KB)

## Libraries not yet documented

- **Mutator** (io.peekandpoke.mutator:core) — KSP-generated code for mutating nested immutable data. Source: https://github.com/PeekAndPoke/ultra/tree/master/mutator
- **Funktor** (io.peekandpoke.funktor:core) — Full-stack Kotlin on Ktor. Source: https://github.com/PeekAndPoke/ultra/tree/master/funktor
